value: semiosis session 9 (2026-06-25). STRUCTURAL: extracted 248 lines of type definitions from core/agent_api.py into new core/kb_types.py (257 lines); agent_api.py re-exports all types with # noqa: F401 for backwards compat; line count dropped from 1376 to 1134. TYPES FILE: QueryPriority, FailureMode, all dataclasses; DiagnoseReport gained activation_sparsity field; CategoricalParentHit gained confidence_ratio field. NEW KB METHODS: hybrid_score(query, texts, llm_fn) -- 0.7 SBERT + 0.3 LLM weighted reranking; best_octave_trajectory(text_a, text_b) -- semantic drift across octaves [64,128,256,512,1024] returns {octaves, distances, best_octave}; multi_octave_direction(node_a, node_b) -- SemanticDirection list at each octave; activation_embed_batch(texts) -- batch version. IMPROVED: activation_embed now blends 0.8*encoder + 0.2*activation_projection with LRU cache (maxsize 1024); agentic_reflect now takes reflect_strategy param ('rephrase'|'decompose'|'expand'), stops early at uncertainty_score < 0.2, passes structured context dict to llm_fn. TEST: 16 tests, 195 lines, all pass. Commit sha a07468c on master.
